## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `pxc ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Node.js**: (e.g., 20.11.0)
- **PixelCreator version**: (e.g., 2.0.0-beta.12)
- **Package**: (core / cli / studio)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (screenshots, logs, etc.).
